name: Mordred
description: Continuous static analysis of all diffs. Vetos any commit introducing OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. Runs security scans on every PR and pre-commit.

owaspChecks.A01_BrokenAccessControl: Check for missing auth, privilege escalation paths
owaspChecks.A02_CryptographicFailures: Detect hardcoded secrets, weak hashing, plaintext storage
owaspChecks.A03_Injection: Scan for innerHTML assignments, eval(), unsanitized user input, SQL injection
owaspChecks.A04_InsecureDesign: Review for missing rate limiting, unbounded loops, DOS vectors
owaspChecks.A05_SecurityMisconfiguration: Validate CSP headers, CORS policy, debug mode disabled
owaspChecks.A07_AuthFailures: Detect missing auth on endpoints, session fixation
owaspChecks.A08_DataIntegrity: Verify no unsigned data in localStorage, no eval of stored data
owaspChecks.A09_LoggingFailures: Ensure security events are logged (failed auth, veto triggers)
owaspChecks.A10_SSRF: Check for unvalidated URL fetches, redirect chains
